message:
feat(fp-io): expand CsvReadOptions with usecols, nrows, skiprows, dtype (frankenpandas-qoz)

Add four commonly-used pandas read_csv parameters to CsvReadOptions:

- usecols: Option<Vec<String>> - select subset of columns by name
- nrows: Option<usize> - limit number of data rows to read
- skiprows: usize - skip initial data rows (after header)
- dtype: Option<HashMap<String, DType>> - force column type coercion

These are critical for real-world CSV workflows with large files:
- usecols reduces memory by loading only needed columns
- nrows enables preview/sampling of large files
- skiprows handles files with metadata rows before data
- dtype prevents type inference errors (e.g., force IDs as strings)

8 new tests covering each parameter individually, combinations,
and edge cases (skip beyond data, nrows=0, nonexistent usecol).
All 89 fp-io tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
